user.title: Add a watch
user.description: Describe what you want in plain English. The watch fetches the page on a schedule, asks your local model whether it contains what you asked for, and turns a binary sensor on when it does.

data.name: Watch name
data.create_anyway: Skip the test run and create anyway

data_description.url: For JavaScript-heavy sites, use the site's JSON API endpoint instead of the page itself (find it in your browser's DevTools Network tab).
data_description.prompt: For example: an air conditioning unit, portable or fixed, under £300.

preview.title: Test run result

error.cannot_connect: Could not fetch the page or reach Ollama. Check both URLs.
error.no_content: The page produced almost no text. It is probably rendered with JavaScript; point the watch at the site's JSON API instead, or tick 'create anyway'.
error.bad_model_reply: The model did not return usable JSON. Try a different model, or tick 'create anyway'.

abort.already_configured: A watch with this URL and description already exists.
